songs.title: C Major Scale
songs.preview: Simple C major scale to get started
songs.description: Learn the basic C major scale. A great way to familiarize yourself with the keyboard!

songs.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
songs.description: A beloved melody that's perfect for beginners. Features simple notes and repetitive patterns.

songs.title: Mary Had a Little Lamb
songs.description: Another classic tune with a simple, repetitive melody that's easy to learn.

songs.title: Ode to Joy
songs.description: The famous theme from Beethoven's 9th Symphony. Features dotted rhythms and longer phrases.

songs.title: Für Elise
songs.description: The instantly recognizable opening of Für Elise. Requires coordination between both hands and faster note transitions.

songs.title: Jingle Bells
songs.description: A festive favorite with varied rhythms and upbeat tempo. Great for practicing timing and dynamics.

songs.title: Canon in D
songs.description: Beautiful baroque piece featuring a repeating bass line and flowing melody. Requires independent hand coordination.

songs.title: Moonlight Sonata
songs.description: The atmospheric opening of one of Beethoven's most famous works. Features triplet arpeggios and sustained melody.

songs.title: Hungarian Dance No. 5
songs.description: Fast-paced and dramatic piece with rapid note sequences and dynamic contrasts. A challenging test of technique!

songs.title: Hot Cross Buns
songs.description: A classic nursery rhyme built on just three notes — the perfect first song for new pianists.

songs.title: Yankee Doodle
songs.description: An upbeat patriotic melody with a fun chorus — great for building finger speed and rhythm.

songs.title: London Bridge
songs.description: A gentle stepwise melody ideal for beginners, introducing small skips and a satisfying phrase structure.

songs.title: Row Row Row Your Boat
songs.description: A cheerful tune in 3/4 time that introduces dotted rhythms and ascending runs up to high C.
